2026-0376
2026-04-21PMONational Security and Intelligence Committee of Parliamentarians ActReappointment of a Executive Director of the Secretariat of the National Security and Intelligence Committee of ParliamentariansReappointment of Lisa Marie Inman of Cantley, Quebec, as Executive Director of the Secretariat of the National Security and Intelligence Committee of Parliamentarians, to hold office during pleasure for a term of five years, effective May 3, 2026.N/A
act: National Security and Intelligence Committee of Parliamentarians Act
subject: Reappointment of a Executive Director of the Secretariat of the National Security and Intelligence Committee of Parliamentarians
precis: Reappointment of Lisa Marie Inman of Cantley, Quebec, as Executive Director of the Secretariat of the National Security and Intelligence Committee of Parliamentarians, to hold office during pleasure for a term of five years, effective May 3, 2026.
